summary: WIN-053 disjunction paragraph now cross-references §6.1 'Zero Fitted Parameters — Hidden Parameters' via anchor #p6-61-0 (note: ISS-1307 proposed anchor #p6-61-1 but the actual rendered anchor is #p6-61-0 — only one Part 6.1 details element exists in sections.json). Both horns of the sub-terranean-return-channel disjunction re-surface the §6.1 hidden-parameters argument, and the cross-ref makes that visible. Patch PATCH-304-A in EXP-304.
